companies.name: Metropolis Technologies
companies.reason: Metropolis recently completed a $1.8 billion financing round to acquire SP Plus Corporation, which provides parking facility management services. This acquisition positions Metropolis as a leader in AI-powered parking technology.

companies.name: Anthropic
companies.reason: Anthropic raised $30 billion in a recent Series G funding round, boosting its valuation to $380 billion. The company is also considering going public, attracting significant interest from venture capital firms.

companies.name: X-Bow Systems
companies.reason: X-Bow Systems secured a $64 million contract from the Department of Defense for developing hypersonic solid rocket motors. They also raised an additional $35 million from strategic investors, expanding their Series C funding.
